description_long: This house is a large, modern multi-family residence with a complex, angular roofline and a mix of flat and gabled roof sections. The exterior features a combination of light-colored walls, dark roofing, and brick or stone accents, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. Multiple large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and visual interest. The property is set on a landscaped plot with paved walkways, steps, and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The house appears to have several distinct sections or wings, possibly accommodating multiple units or a spacious single-family layout. The overall design emphasizes geometric forms, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A large, modern multi-family house with angular roofs, brick accents, and asymmetrical windows, set on a landscaped plot with walkways and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, multiple roof sections, and a prominent driveway with landscaped surroundings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, stepped terrain, and the mix of flat and gabled rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the segmented layout of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick exterior, side entry points, and the continuation of the angular roof design.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a modern door flanked by large windows
